mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name AS category_name, u.nickname AS author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, summary, category_id, author_id, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{categoryId}, #{authorId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
